name: @hyperscape/plugin-hyperscape
description: ElizaOS plugin for AI agents to play Hyperscape 3D multiplayer RPG
author: Hyperscape Team

scripts.build: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true, maxRetries: 10, retryDelay: 100 })" && (tsc || echo '⚠️ tsc had errors (likely circular dep), continuing...')
scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true, maxRetries: 10, retryDelay: 100 }); fs.rmSync('tsconfig.tsbuildinfo', { force: true });"
